summary: V66.0 Absolute Zero Parity - All 37 backend tests pass. All 22 modules now have 6 materials each (132 total, 198 tools). The final 4 modules (Automotive, Meditation, Speaking, Philosophy) expanded from 3 to 6 materials. All 12 new materials have full 6-depth dive_layers (depth 0-5). Oracle Search finds new materials correctly. XP wiring intact for all domains.
